jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend
jobs.content:
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our backend team.

Requirements

  • 5+ years experience with TypeScript and Node.js
  • Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis
  • Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes
  • Experience building REST APIs

Nice to have

  • Experience with AWS
  • Knowledge of GraphQL

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.content:
Join our frontend team! We use React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

  • 2+ years experience with React
  • Strong JavaScript/TypeScript skills
  • CSS and HTML proficiency

jobs.title: Data Engineer
jobs.content: Looking for a data engineer experienced in Python, Spark, and Airflow. Knowledge of SQL and BigQuery preferred.
